final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit DRAM cell with write and read functionality.
// The write enable (we) controls whether the data input (d) is written to the cell,
// while the read enable (re) controls whether the cell's value is read onto the output (q).
// When we is low, the cell does not store any new data, and when re is low, the output remains unchanged.
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,  // Write enable
    input wire re,  // Read enable
    input wire d,   // Data input
    output reg q    // Data output
);
    reg stored_value; // Internal storage for the DRAM cell

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            stored_value <= d; // Write data to the cell
        end
        if (re) begin
            q <= stored_value; // Read data from the cell
        end
    end
endmodule
